# Stay Portland — Full Site Information

> Portland's local vacation rental booking platform. Book direct — no fees, lowest price guaranteed.

## Overview

Stay Portland (stayportland.com) is a direct-booking vacation rental platform for Portland, Oregon. We manage 500+ design-forward homes across the city's most walkable neighborhoods. By booking direct, guests avoid the 10-15% service fees charged by third-party platforms like Airbnb and VRBO.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://stayportland.com
- Browse All Properties: https://stayportland.com/properties
- Contact Us: https://stayportland.com/contact

## Neighborhoods

Stay Portland properties are located across Portland's most popular neighborhoods:

- **Division Street**: Trendy restaurants, breweries, and boutiques along SE Division
- **Alberta Arts District**: Eclectic arts scene, galleries, and vibrant street life in NE Portland
- **Hawthorne**: Classic Portland — vintage shops, cafes, and tree-lined streets in SE Portland
- **Pearl District**: Upscale urban living with galleries, restaurants, and Powell's Books
- **Mississippi**: Creative hub with local restaurants, bars, and weekend markets in N Portland
- **Kerns**: Central eastside location near dining, nightlife, and easy access to downtown
- **Sellwood-Moreland**: Antique shops and family-friendly parks along the Willamette River
- **St. Johns**: Charming neighborhood near Cathedral Park and the St. Johns Bridge
- **Buckman**: Inner SE Portland with walkable access to restaurants and bars
- **Foster-Powell**: Up-and-coming SE neighborhood with great food and community feel

## Property Types

- **Studios & 1-Bedrooms**: Ideal for solo travelers and couples. Compact, design-forward spaces.
- **2-3 Bedroom Homes**: Perfect for families and small groups. Full kitchens and living areas.
- **4-5+ Bedroom Houses**: Large group and family reunion-friendly. Multiple bathrooms, outdoor spaces.
- **Pet-Friendly Properties**: Select homes welcome dogs — filter by pet-friendly on the search page.

## Standard Amenities

Most Stay Portland properties include:
- Full kitchen with cookware, dishes, and coffee maker
- High-speed Wi-Fi
- Smart TV with streaming apps
- Washer and dryer (in-unit or on-site)
- Fresh linens and towels (hotel-quality)
- Dedicated workspace
- Climate control (heating/AC)
- Free on-site or street parking

## Booking Flow

1. **Browse**: Visit /properties to see all available homes. Filter by dates, guest count, neighborhood, bedrooms, and amenities.
2. **Select**: Click a property to view the full listing — photos, description, amenities, house rules, and a neighborhood map.
3. **Quote**: Enter your check-in/check-out dates and number of guests to see an instant price quote with full cost breakdown.
4. **Book**: Complete your booking with a credit card. No account creation required. You'll receive a confirmation email with check-in instructions.

## Pricing Model

- **Nightly rate**: Varies by property, season, and length of stay
- **Cleaning fee**: One-time fee per stay (varies by property size)
- **Taxes**: Oregon lodging tax applied at checkout
- **No booking fees**: Unlike Airbnb/VRBO, Stay Portland charges zero service or booking fees
- **Lowest price guarantee**: Our direct rates are always equal to or lower than any third-party listing

## Why Book Direct with Stay Portland

1. **Save 10-15%**: No platform service fees — the price you see is the real price
2. **Lowest price guarantee**: We guarantee our direct rate is the lowest available anywhere
3. **Local team**: Portland-based team available for guest support before, during, and after your stay
4. **Quality assured**: Every home is professionally managed, cleaned, and maintained
5. **Locally curated interiors**: Homes are styled to reflect Portland's character — not generic rentals
6. **Flexible communication**: Reach us directly via the contact page — no middleman platform

## Guest Experience

- **Check-in**: Self check-in with keyless entry (code provided via email before arrival)
- **Support**: Local team available for questions or issues during your stay
- **Checkout**: Simple checkout instructions provided — no early morning departures required

## Ideal For

- **Vacationers**: Explore Portland's food scene, nature, and culture from a neighborhood home base
- **Remote workers**: Fast Wi-Fi and dedicated workspaces for productive stays
- **Families**: Spacious homes with full kitchens, yards, and family-friendly neighborhoods
- **Groups**: Large homes for reunions, celebrations, and group trips
- **Business travelers**: Comfortable, quiet spaces with reliable internet and parking
- **Relocators**: Extended stays for people moving to Portland or between homes

## Contact

- Contact page: https://stayportland.com/contact
- Website: https://stayportland.com
